body.head: Iḷampūraṇar
body.p: ivvōttu eṉṉa peyarttō veṉiṉ, vēṟṟumai eṉappaṭṭa cila poruḷ uṇarttiṉamaiyiṉ, vēṟṟumai yiyal eṉṉum peyarttu. mēl ōttiṉuḷ nālvakaippaṭṭa coṟkaḷaiyum poruḷkaḷmēlāmāṟu kūṟip pōntāṉ; avaṟṟuḷ mutalatu peyarccol; ataṉatu ilakkaṇam uṇarttiya eṭuttukkoṇṭāṉ. itu mēlōttiṉoṭu iyaipu eṅṅaṉam uṇarttiṉāṉō veṉiṉ, payaṉilai ceppalum, urupēṟṟalum, kālantōṉṟāmaiyum peyaratu ilakkaṇam eṉa uṇarttiṉāṉ eṉpatu.
maṟṟu, it talaiccūttiram eṉṉutaliṟṟōveṉiṉ, taṉṉāl uṇarttappaṭum poruḷai iṉaittu eṉṟu varaiyaṟuttal nutaliṟṟu.
urai: vēṟṟumai eṉṟu collappaṭuvaṉa eḻuvakaiya eṉṟavāṟu.
ivvēṟṟumaikaḷ poruḷkaḷai vēṟṟumai ceyyumāṟu, avaṟṟavaṟṟuc ciṟappuc cūttirattāṉ aṟika.

body.head: Cēṉāvaraiyar
body.p: nāṉkucoṟkum potuvilakkaṇamuṇarttiṉār ataṟkiṭaiyīṭiṉṟi avaṟṟatu ciṟappilakkaṇamuṇarttutaṉmuṟaimaiyāyiṉum, vēṟṟumaiyilakkaṇamuṇarttutaṟku vēṟiṭamiṉmaiyāṉum, potuvilakkaṇamātaloppumaiyāṉum, urupēṟṟal peyarkkilakkaṇamākaliṉ vēṟṟumaiyuṇarttip peyaruṇarttaṉmuṟaiyākālāṉum, kiḷaviyākkattiṟkum peyariyaṟkumiṭai vēṟṟumaiyilakkaṇamuṇarttiyveṭuttukkoṇṭār. vēṟṟumaiyāvaṉa peyarum ōriṭaiccollumākaliṉ, avaṟṟatilakkaṇamum potuvilakkaṇamēyām.
vēṟṟumaiyilakkaṇameṉa oṉṟāyiṉum, ciṟappuṭaiya eḻuvakaivēṟṟumaiyum avaṟṟatu mayakkamum viḷivēṟṟumaiyun taṉittaṉiyuṇarttattakum vēṟupāṭuyāppuṭaimaiyāṉ, mūṉṟōttāṉuṇarttiṉār.

potuvilakkaṇamuṇarttic ciṟappilakkaṇamuṇarttutaṉmuṟaiyākaliṉ, mutaṟkaṇṇatākiya peyarccoṟkup payaṉilai kōṭalum urupēṟṟalum kālantōṉṟāmaiyumākiya ilakkaṇamuṇarttuvār iyaipupaṭṭamaiyāṉ vēṟṟumaiyilakkaṇamuṇarttiṉāreṉa mēlōttiṉōṭu ivvōttiṭaiyiyaipu kūṟiṉārāl uraiyāciriyareṉiṉ;― aṟṟaṉṟu: ivvōttup peyarilakkaṇanutaliyeṭuttukkoḷḷappaṭṭatāyiṉ, urupēṟṟalum payaṉilaikōṭaluṅ kālantōṉṟāmaiyumākiya peyarilakkaṇam muṉṉōti, iyaipupaṭutalāṉ vēṟṟumaiyuṇarttuṅkaruttiṉarāyiṉ avaṟṟaiyum iṉṉavilakkaṇattaveṉa uṇarttip piṉṉum eṭuttukkoṇṭa peyarilakkaṇamēpaṟṟiyōtip peyariyaleṉa ōrōttāṉ muṭiyaṟpāṟṟaṉṟē; avvāṟaṉṟi, vēṟṟumaiyilakkaṇamē muṉ kūṟi “aṉṟi yaṉaittum peyarppaya ṉilaiyē” eṉavum “īṟu peyark kāku miyaṟkaiya veṉpa” eṉavum vēṟṟumaiyilakkaṇaṅ kūṟi accūttirattāṟpayaṉilai kōṭalum urupēṟṟalum peyarkkilakkaṇameṉpatu uyttuṇaravaittup piṉṉum vēṟṟumaiyilakkaṇamēyuṇartti, itaṉai vēṟṟumaiyōtteṉṟum, avaṟṟatu mayakkamuṇarttiyavōttai vēṟṟumaimayaṅkiyaleṉṟum, ciṟappillā viḷivēṟṟumaiyuṇarttiyavōttai viḷimarapeṉṟum, nutaliyataṉāṟpeyar koṭuttu, mūṉṟōttāka vaittu, peyariyaleṉa vēṟōrōttiṟkup peyar koṭuttamaiyāṉum, “ellāc collum poruḷ kuṟit taṉavē” eṉpatu mutalākiya aintucūttiramum peyarilakkaṇamuṇarttu mōttiṉmuṉ vaiyātu iṭaivaittal poruntāmaiyāṉum, ivvōttup peyarilakkaṇanutaliyeṭuttukkoḷḷappaṭṭataṉṟu, vēṟṟumaiyilakkaṇamē nutaliyeḻuntateṉavēpaṭum; ataṉāṉ avarkkatu karuttaṉṟeṉka. aḵtēl, “peyarnilaik kiḷavi kālan tōṉṟā” eṉappeyarilakkaṇam īṇṭuk kūṟiyateṉṉaiyeṉiṉ;― payaṉilai kōṭalum urupēṟṟalum peyarilakkaṇameṉpatu īṇṭuppeṟappaṭṭamaiyāṉ, avaṟṟōṭiyaiyak kālantōṉṟāmaiyum īṇṭē kūṟiṉār, peyarilak kaṇamātaloppumaiyāṉeṉpatu.
iccūttirattiṉ poruḷ. vēṟṟumaiyāvaṉa ēḻeṉṟu colluvar tollāciriyar. e - ṟu.

ceyappaṭuporuṇmutalāyiṉavākap peyarpporuḷai vēṟupaṭuttuṇarttaliṉ, vēṟṟumaiyāyiṉa. ceyappaṭuporuṇmutalāyiṉavaṟṟiṉ vēṟupaṭuttup poruḷmāttiramuṇarttaliṉ, eḻuvāyum vēṟṟumaiyāyiṟṟu. allatūum, vēṟṟumaiyeṉpatu paṉmai paṟṟiya vaḻakkeṉiṉumaiyum.

body.head: Nacciṉārkkiṉiyar
body.p: eṉpatu cūttiram. ivvōttu, ceyappaṭu poruḷ mutaliyaṉavākap peyarpporuḷai vēṟupaṭuttu uṇarttaliṉ, vēṟṟumai ōttu eṉṟu kāraṇappeyar peṟṟutu. muṉṉar nāṉku coṟkum potu ilakkaṇam uṇarttiya atikārattāṉē ippotu ilakkaṇam kūṟukiṉṟa ōttiṉaiyum cerak kūṟiṉār. `ap potu ilakkaṇam eṉṉai?' eṉiṉ, vēṟṟumai tāmum peyarum orucār viṉaiccollum iṭaiccollum uriccollumākiya potu ilakkaṇamātal uṭaimaiyāṉum,
eṉavum, toḻiṟpeyar kālam tōṉṟum eṉavum mēṟkūṟum ciṟappuṭaip peyarkkup potu ilakkaṇam īṇṭuk kūṟutal uṭaimaiyāṉum ivvōttup potu ilakkaṇamē kūṟiyatāyiṟṟu.
`āyiṉ, vēṟṟumai mayaṅkilum viḷi marapum iṭai vaittatu eṉṉai?' eṉiṉ, ivvēṟṟumaiyiṉ

mayakkam yāppuṭaimaiyiṉ vēṟu ōttākki, viḷi ivaipōṟ ciṟappiṉmaiyiṉ vēṟu ōr ōttākki vaittār. iṅṅaṉam vaittup piṉṉarc ciṟanta peyar viṉai iṭai urikaḷai muṟaiyē kūṟi, ivaṟṟuḷ eñci niṉṟa ilakkaṇattai eccaviyaliṟ kūṟiṉār eṉṟu uṇarka.
`poruṇmai cuṭṭal' mutaliya āṟu poruḷaiyum kuṟittu avaṟṟāl tāṉ vēṟupaṭa niṟṟalāṉum, muṭikkum collait tāṉ vicēṭittu niṟṟalāṉum eḻuvāyum vēṟṟumaiyāyiṟṟu.
(i-ḷ.)vēṟṟumai tāmē ēḻeṉa moḻipa-vēṟṟumaiyāvaṉa ēḻeṉṟu colluvar tollāciriyar(e-ṟu.)
